item.title: D11 Dozer Equalizer Bar Makeover Pt. 1
item.description: A heavy equipment repair begins with the restoration of a D11 dozer equalizer bar. The video follows the initial inspection, machining, and preparation needed to rebuild this critical component. What step of the repair process interests you most?

media:content.media:title: D11 Dozer Equalizer Bar Makeover Pt. 1
media:content.media:description: A heavy equipment repair begins with the restoration of a D11 dozer equalizer bar. The video follows the initial inspection, machining, and preparation needed to rebuild this critical component. What step of the repair process interests you most?

item.title: Restoring the Franna Crane Boom
item.description: A restoration project focuses on repairing and rebuilding a Franna crane boom. The video showcases machining, fabrication, and precision engineering used to return the boom to working condition. What aspect of crane restoration do you find most interesting?

media:content.media:title: Restoring the Franna Crane Boom
media:content.media:description: A restoration project focuses on repairing and rebuilding a Franna crane boom. The video showcases machining, fabrication, and precision engineering used to return the boom to working condition. What aspect of crane restoration do you find most interesting?

item.title: Cat 631 Gets Brand-New Parts Treatment
item.description: A CAT 631 machine receives new replacement components as part of a restoration and maintenance project. The video highlights installation, inspection, and preparation for continued service. Which part of heavy equipment maintenance interests you most?

media:content.media:title: Cat 631 Gets Brand-New Parts Treatment
media:content.media:description: A CAT 631 machine receives new replacement components as part of a restoration and maintenance project. The video highlights installation, inspection, and preparation for continued service. Which part of heavy equipment maintenance interests you most?

item.title: Relocating a Megabore Lathe Handwheel
item.description: A workshop modification improves the usability of a Megabore lathe by relocating its handwheel. The video explores practical engineering changes and machine improvements. What workshop upgrade would you make first?

media:content.media:title: Relocating a Megabore Lathe Handwheel
media:content.media:description: A workshop modification improves the usability of a Megabore lathe by relocating its handwheel. The video explores practical engineering changes and machine improvements. What workshop upgrade would you make first?

item.title: Freeing a Stuck Heavy Cylinder
item.description: A workshop tackles the challenge of freeing a seized hydraulic cylinder using specialized repair techniques. The video follows the process from diagnosis to restoration. What would be your first step when dealing with seized equipment?

media:content.media:title: Freeing a Stuck Heavy Cylinder
media:content.media:description: A workshop tackles the challenge of freeing a seized hydraulic cylinder using specialized repair techniques. The video follows the process from diagnosis to restoration. What would be your first step when dealing with seized equipment?

item.title: Crack Repair on a Telescopic Cylinder
item.description: A damaged telescopic hydraulic cylinder undergoes precision repair to restore its strength and functionality. The video highlights machining, welding, and careful inspection. What heavy equipment repair interests you most?

media:content.media:title: Crack Repair on a Telescopic Cylinder
media:content.media:description: A damaged telescopic hydraulic cylinder undergoes precision repair to restore its strength and functionality. The video highlights machining, welding, and careful inspection. What heavy equipment repair interests you most?

item.title: Apron Gear Repair and Precision Fix
item.description: A worn apron gear is restored through precision machining and repair techniques. The video follows the process of returning the component to reliable operation. What workshop repair would you like to learn more about?

media:content.media:title: Apron Gear Repair and Precision Fix
media:content.media:description: A worn apron gear is restored through precision machining and repair techniques. The video follows the process of returning the component to reliable operation. What workshop repair would you like to learn more about?

item.title: Helping a Customer Save Thousands
item.description: A cost-saving repair project restores an industrial component instead of replacing it. The video shows how precision machining can extend equipment life and reduce expenses. What repair do you think offers the biggest savings?

media:content.media:title: Helping a Customer Save Thousands
media:content.media:description: A cost-saving repair project restores an industrial component instead of replacing it. The video shows how precision machining can extend equipment life and reduce expenses. What repair do you think offers the biggest savings?

item.title: Precision Milling With a Vintage Jig Borer
item.description: A vintage jig borer is put to work on a precision milling project. The video highlights the machine's accuracy, setup, and machining capabilities. What classic machine tool would you like to see in action?

media:content.media:title: Precision Milling With a Vintage Jig Borer
media:content.media:description: A vintage jig borer is put to work on a precision milling project. The video highlights the machine's accuracy, setup, and machining capabilities. What classic machine tool would you like to see in action?

item.title: Centre Lathe Service and Maintenance
item.description: A workshop maintenance guide covering the servicing of a centre lathe. The video focuses on inspection, cleaning, lubrication, and adjustments to keep the machine operating accurately. What maintenance task do you think is most important?

media:content.media:title: Centre Lathe Service and Maintenance
media:content.media:description: A workshop maintenance guide covering the servicing of a centre lathe. The video focuses on inspection, cleaning, lubrication, and adjustments to keep the machine operating accurately. What maintenance task do you think is most important?

item.title: The Puzzle Is Still Not Solved
item.description: An engineering project continues as the team works through an unresolved mechanical problem. The video explores troubleshooting, inspection, and the search for the root cause. What do you think is the key to solving complex mechanical issues?

media:content.media:title: The Puzzle Is Still Not Solved
media:content.media:description: An engineering project continues as the team works through an unresolved mechanical problem. The video explores troubleshooting, inspection, and the search for the root cause. What do you think is the key to solving complex mechanical issues?

item.title: Extending a Cylinder with Precision
item.description: A machining project modifies a hydraulic cylinder to increase its length for a specific application. The video highlights precision engineering and fabrication techniques. What custom workshop project would you like to see?

media:content.media:title: Extending a Cylinder with Precision
media:content.media:description: A machining project modifies a hydraulic cylinder to increase its length for a specific application. The video highlights precision engineering and fabrication techniques. What custom workshop project would you like to see?

item.title: Saving a Cylinder Through Precision Repair
item.description: A precision repair restores a worn hydraulic cylinder instead of replacing it. The video demonstrates machining techniques that help extend the component's service life. What repair would you choose over replacement?

media:content.media:title: Saving a Cylinder Through Precision Repair
media:content.media:description: A precision repair restores a worn hydraulic cylinder instead of replacing it. The video demonstrates machining techniques that help extend the component's service life. What repair would you choose over replacement?

item.title: Repairing a Cracked D10 Equalizer Bar
item.description: A heavy equipment repair project restores a cracked equalizer bar from a CAT D10 dozer. The video follows the machining, welding, and repair process to return the component to service. What repair technique stands out most to you?

media:content.media:title: Repairing a Cracked D10 Equalizer Bar
media:content.media:description: A heavy equipment repair project restores a cracked equalizer bar from a CAT D10 dozer. The video follows the machining, welding, and repair process to return the component to service. What repair technique stands out most to you?

item.title: Progress on a Heavy-Duty Parts Washer
item.description: An update on the construction of a heavy-duty parts washer, showcasing fabrication progress, assembly work, and workshop engineering. What feature would you add to a parts washer?

media:content.media:title: Progress on a Heavy-Duty Parts Washer
media:content.media:description: An update on the construction of a heavy-duty parts washer, showcasing fabrication progress, assembly work, and workshop engineering. What feature would you add to a parts washer?

item.title: Repairing a D10 Dozer’s Broken Eye
item.description: A D10 dozer comes in with a broken eye and a serious crack, setting up a precision repair challenge. Watch the machining and fabrication process as the damage is restored with careful engineering.

media:content.media:title: Repairing a D10 Dozer’s Broken Eye
media:content.media:description: A D10 dozer comes in with a broken eye and a serious crack, setting up a precision repair challenge. Watch the machining and fabrication process as the damage is restored with careful engineering.
